Name: Zakir Houssein
Bio: Ustad Zakir Hussain is an Indian tabla player, composer, percussionist, music producer and film actor.

Name: Anouar Brahem
Bio: Anouar Brahem is a Tunisian oud player and composer. He is widely acclaimed as an innovator in his field

Name: Baaba Maal
Bio: Baaba Maal is a Senegalese singer and guitarist born in Podor, on the Senegal River. In addition to acoustic guitar, he also plays percussion.

Name: Mohammed Abdu
Bio: Mohammed Abdu is a Saudi singer who is renowned across the Middle East and Arab world. He has been described as “Artist of the Arabs”.
